subcodes.first_line: O thou who art dear in love! Thy letter was received and gratitude for its arrival was made known. Praise and prayer remain as before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محبت مدار نامه رسید و شکرانه وصول تحاریر معلوم گردید ستایش و نیایش همان
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @stories; anecdotes, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @poems and quotation from poetry
